items.title: Rant on people complaining about packs and pulls
items.summary:
Plenty of pulls (unless you like to get needless copies). I have zero clue why someone said 500 bucks for an event?? Where?? And if they were talking about all the packs the game has to offer, yeah I actually agree it’s not worth it. But you know why? Because their bad value is so clearly meant for the whales AND there is no PVP so there’s been no FOMO for me. Coming from someone who has quit countless games from FOMO. 

And you’re supposed to use your brain (and patience) to pull for good characters with the plentiful pulls you have, gradually build characters, and THEN clear ENDGAME content. You aren’t supposed to grab the one specific character you want. You pull on the current limited banners (which have characters CAPABLE of clearing lots of content). Before then, there is plenty to do. I’m 3 weeks in and still progressing my way WITHOUT roadblocks through chapter seven out of however many on ARC ONE. And I’ve still yet to get into d-tide or that train thing or whatever.

And they did mention 60 bucks for 250 pulls but forgot to mention that the same event gives you 250 FREE pulls…also it’s not 60 bucks it’s like 40. 250 being handed out is already diabolical like what are you talking about, u want a thousand when a character is guaranteed at 90 pulls, but pity is at 30?

Not a single character is useless. Like if a character is listed as B tier, they’re GREAT in certain comps. C tier too depending on the guide you’re using. Even standard characters are good. Caecus and Sanga are cracked.

And finally, great art. 

My only complaint would be that most characters aren’t animated, but I found out the game was close to EOS not long ago so it makes sense.

I feel bad for the ppl who can’t login though. Had to connect my account on several devices and though it was confusing, I eventually brute forced my way through with my apple account.
items.author: Severelag
